div.head: 238. Telegram From the Central Intelligence Agency to Operation PBSUCCESS Headquarters in FloridaSource: Central Intelligence Agency, Job 79–01025A, Box 9, Folder 3. Secret; Priority; RYBAT; PBSUCCESS. Drafted by Wisner.
div.p: 06731. Ascham sends congratulations all hands PBSUCCESS with regard to heartening gains and improvement in situation of last forty–eight hours. He particularly wishes that SHERWOOD team be commended and also that SOMERSET take action commend in the name of Calligeris the pilots whose professional performance and careful attention to requirements have been outstanding.
